basic_details.job_title: Tezpur University Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Project Associate and Field Assistant Posts
basic_details.short_information: Tezpur University Project Associate and Field Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 21 June 2026 on the official website of Tezpur University. A total of 6 vacancies have been announced through the Tezpur University Project Associate and Field Assistant Walk-in Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years (as per Government of India rules for relaxation)

qualification.education_qualification: MA/Ph.D. in Linguistics/Applied Linguistics/Computational Linguistics and Allied subjects. UGC NET preferred for Project Associate.
qualification.details: Project Associate: MA/Ph.D. in Linguistics/Applied Linguistics/Computational Linguistics and Allied subjects. UGC NET preferred. Field Assistant: MA in Linguistics/Applied Linguistics/Computational Linguistics and Allied subjects.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to send the advance copy of the CV?
faq.answer: The last date to send the advance copy of your Curriculum Vitae (CV) via email is 21st June 2026. Ensure it is sent to the provided email addresses.

faq.question: Q2. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview for the Project Associate and Field Assistant positions at Tezpur University is scheduled for 23rd June 2026. Candidates should report at the venue by 10:00 AM.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for Project Associate?
faq.answer: For the Project Associate position, candidates need to have an MA or Ph.D. in Linguistics, Applied Linguistics, Computational Linguistics, or allied subjects. UGC NET qualification is preferred.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for the Field Assistant position?
faq.answer: The Field Assistant position offers a consolidated salary of ₹20,000/- per month, excluding 18% GST. This is a project-based role.

faq.question: Q5. What is the maximum age limit for these posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for both Project Associate and Field Assistant positions is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per the Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available in total?
faq.answer: Tezpur University has announced a total of 6 vacancies for the Project Associate and Field Assistant positions combined.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original and self-attested photocopies of mark sheets, certificates from 10th standard onwards, caste certificate (if applicable), experience certificate (if any), and a copy of their recent signed CV.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive. Candidates can attend the walk-in interview without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process for these project-based positions will be through a Walk-in Interview, which will be conducted in a blended mode.

faq.question: Q10. Where is Tezpur University located?
faq.answer: Tezpur University is located in Tezpur, Assam, with the pincode 784028. The walk-in interview will be held at the university campus.
